aeo_readiness.summary: The website has basic AEO elements in place, such as schema markup and service area listings, but lacks depth in content, reviews, and structured data optimization.
quick_wins: Implement a strategy to generate and display customer reviews on the website and Google Business Profile.
Expand service pages with detailed content, FAQs, and targeted keywords.
Optimize meta tags and headers with location-specific keywords.

gbp_analysis.found: No Google Business Profile (GBP) reviews found.
gbp_analysis.summary: The business lacks a GBP, which is crucial for local search visibility and customer engagement.
critical_issues: Missing opportunity to engage with local customers through GBP features.

nap_citations.summary: The business has consistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone Number) information on the website but lacks citations on major local directories.
action_items: Create and verify GBP listing with accurate NAP information.
Build citations on high-authority local directories such as Yelp, Yellow Pages, and local chamber of commerce websites.
Monitor and maintain consistency of NAP information across all platforms.

schema_gaps: No Product schema for services offered.
No Review schema to display customer testimonials.
No FAQ schema to address common customer questions.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of customer reviews and engagement signals.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local search users who rely on reviews and GBP information.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing a review generation strategy and creating a GBP listing.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Building citations and backlinks from local authoritative sources to improve local search ranking.
